phrases.intent_en: Is there a coat check for ski jackets
phrases.text_local: Gibt es eine Garderobe für Skijacken?
phrases.cultural_note: Seasonal coat checks are common in Austrian beer halls during winter months. Staff will confirm availability based on current conditions.
Outdoor beer gardens in Austria are generally open year-round unless weather conditions prevent it. Staff may refer to seasonal opening hours.

phrases.intent_en: Do I pay before or after ordering
phrases.text_local: Zahlt man vor oder nach dem Bestellen?
phrases.cultural_note: In fast-kasual settings like self-service beer halls, payment is typically made before consumption at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the garden voucher counter
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Gutscheinschalter im Garten?
phrases.cultural_note: Voucher systems in Austrian beer gardens are typically handled at a dedicated counter or the main service desk.

likely_response.local: Im Alten Bräustüberl, am Tresen rechts.
likely_response.translation_en: In the Altes Bräustüberl, at the counter on the right.

responses.english: In the Altes Bräustüberl, at the counter on the right.
responses.french: Im Alten Bräustüberl, am Tresen rechts.
